data.title: ETH falls below 2700 USDT

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a 1.97% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 24, 2025, 04:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,694.899902 USDT, with a narrowed 1.97% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Infini Stolen Funds Transferred To Tornado Cash Wallet
data.description: According to Odaily, monitoring by PeckShield has revealed that funds stolen from Infini have been transferred to a wallet funded by Tornado Cash. The stolen assets have already been converted into DAI. It is suspected that the private key for wallet 0xc49b...e3e1 may have been compromised.

data.title: Du Jun: Infini can provide 5 million to 10 million US dollars if needed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Du Jun posted on the X platform: "Infini has no major problems. I have talked to the team, and they are all good in terms of operational ideas, marketing, and financial strength. It is better to spend a little money to learn a lesson and strengthen security capabilities than to lose a lot of money when the business is big. I can give 5-10m if needed, but I am worried that I can't invest."

data.title: Infini Attack Investigation Progresses
data.description: According to PANews, SlowMist's Cosine has responded to Infini founder @Christianeth, stating that they are fully investigating the Infini attack incident. The attacker is described as a technically skilled individual.

data.title: Infini Lianchuang responded to the theft rumors: the engineer involved has been located and controlled, and will be compensated in full
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to community news, Infini has abnormal transfers and is suspected of being stolen. Infini co-founder @0xsexybanana responded to the theft rumors and said: "Don't worry, we will pay in full. The engineer in the accident has been located and controlled. Don't worry. The police have been reported." According to Certik Alert monitoring, Ethereum contract 0x9A79f4105A4e1A050Ba0b42F25351D394fA7E1DC has abnormal fund transfers, and the receiving address 0x3ac96134fb0e42a52d33045aee50b89790f05ed0 has received approximately 49.5 million US dollars and is converting the funds into stablecoin Dai. The specific details are that the account 0xc49b5e5b9da66b9126c1a62e9761e6b2147de3e1 was hacked and the address 0x8e9b was granted permission to withdraw all funds. The attacker has converted all funds into 17,696 ETH (worth 49 million US dollars).

data.title: Infini contract was attacked, and more than 49 million US dollars were stolen. Infini officials said they would pay full compensation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Certik Alert monitoring, the Ethereum contract 0x9A79f4105A4e1A050Ba0b42F25351D394fA7E1DC has abnormal fund transfers, and the receiving address 0x3ac96134fb0e42a52d33045aee50b89790f05ed0 has received about 49.5 million US dollars and is exchanging the funds for stablecoin Dai. The specific details are that the account 0xc49b5e5b9da66b9126c1a62e9761e6b2147de3e1 was hacked and granted the address 0x8e9b permission to withdraw all funds. The attacker has exchanged all funds for 17,696 ETH (worth 49 million US dollars). The community reported that it was an infini contract, and infini officials responded that they were investigating and that the losses would be compensated in full.

data.title: Infini Co-Founder Assures Full Compensation After Security Incident
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 24, Infini co-founder Christine addressed the recent incident involving the platform, assuring stakeholders that full compensation will be provided. Christine confirmed that the engineer responsible for the issue has been identified and detained. The authorities have been notified, and Christine promised to keep everyone updated on the progress.

Earlier today, it was reported that the Infini platform may have suffered an attack, resulting in an estimated loss of approximately $49.5 million.

data.title: Crypto Market Dynamics Shift As Altcoin Season Fades
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 24, CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju shared an analysis indicating that the traditional capital flow cycle of the altcoin season is now outdated. He metaphorically compared the change to climate shifts, stating that the rainy season has vanished, leaving only occasional light showers.

The dominance of Bitcoin in the crypto asset rotation has largely concluded, driven by regulatory developments and institutional adoption. Future capital movements are expected to occur through stablecoins or widely adopted altcoins, marking a departure from the conventional altcoin season.

data.title: dYdX Community Votes On Withdrawal Of Stride Liquidity Staking Plan
data.description: According to Foresight News, the dYdX community has initiated a proposal vote on whether to withdraw from the Stride liquidity staking plan. The proposal currently has a 98.15% approval rate and voting is set to conclude on February 27. The proposal suggests that, following successful testing, the remaining 19,461,949.197705 stDYDX should be transferred to the Treasury SubDAO's control address.
